CustomField.description: Populates when any LQS field is either Qualified Lead - Warm or Qualified Lead - Hot. If multiple LQS fields are Warm and Hot concurrently, this field will populate with Qualified Lead - Hot.
CustomField.formula:
IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(LQS_Air__c , "Qualified Lead - Hot") , ISPICKVAL( LQS_Applied_Genomics__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Chemicals__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Clinical_Studies__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Digital_Lab__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Disease_Research__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Drug_Discovery__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Energy__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Quality__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Forensics_and_Security__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Geochemistry_Mining_and_Metals__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Material__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Maternal_Fetal_Health__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Newborn_Screening__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Geochemistry_Mining_and_Metals__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Pre_Clinical_Studies__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_QA_QC_Drug_Manufacturing_Process__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Soil_Solids__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Strategic_Services__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Water__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL( Lead_Qualification_Stage__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot") ), "Qualified Lead - Hot",
IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(LQS_Air__c , "Qualified Lead - Warm") , ISPICKVAL( LQS_Applied_Genomics__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Chemicals__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Clinical_Studies__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Digital_Lab__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Disease_Research__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Drug_Discovery__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Energy__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Food_Quality__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Food_Safety__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Forensics_and_Security__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Geochemistry_Mining_and_Metals__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Material__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Maternal_Fetal_Health__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Newborn_Screening__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Geochemistry_Mining_and_Metals__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Pre_Clinical_Studies__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_QA_QC_Drug_Manufacturing_Process__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Soil_Solids__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Strategic_Services__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( LQS_Water__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL( Lead_Qualification_Stage__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm") ), "Qualified Lead - Warm", null))
CustomField.label: LQS - Warm or Hot
